rationale: This page is a full-page advertisement for Vision IAS coaching services. It highlights their past UPSC CSE results from 2013 to 2024 and promotes upcoming Foundation Courses for General Studies (Prelims cum Mains) for the years 2026, 2027, 2028, and 2029 across various Indian cities. It contains no educational content related to the Environment subject.
cleanedText:
VISION IAS - INSPIRING INNOVATION
OUR ACHIEVEMENTS
A graph illustrating the number of selections and top ranks from 2013 to 2024:
- 2013: Gaurav Agrawal (AIR 1)
- 2015: Tina Dabi (AIR 1)
- 2016: Anmol Sher Singh Bedi (AIR 2)
- 2017: Sachin Gupta (AIR 3)
- 2018: Kanishak Kataria (AIR 1)
- 2019: Jatin Kishore (AIR 2)
- 2020: Shubham Kumar (AIR 1)
- 2021: Ankita Agarwal (AIR 2)
- 2022: Ishita Kishore (AIR 1)
- 2023: Aditya Srivastava (AIR 1)
- 2024: Shakti Dubey (10 in Top 10)
Foundation Course GENERAL STUDIES PRELIMS cum MAINS 2027, 2028 & 2029
- Live/Online Classes Available
- Delhi Batch Start Dates: 23 Dec, 6 Jan, 16 Jan, 23 Jan
- GTB Nagar Batch Start Date: 7 Jan
- Other Center Start Dates: Ahmedabad (17 Jan), Bengaluru (19 Jan), Bhopal (21 Jan), Hyderabad (21 Jan), Jaipur (10 Dec), Jodhpur (2 Dec), Lucknow (21 Jan), Pune (27 Jan)
फाउंडेशन कोर्स सामान्य अध्ययन 2026 (Foundation Course General Studies 2026)
- प्रारंभिक, मुख्य परीक्षा और निबंध के लिए महत्वपूर्ण सभी टॉपिक का विस्तृत कवरेज (Comprehensive coverage of all important topics for Prelims, Mains, and Essay).
- दिल्ली (Delhi) बैच प्रारंभ: 25 नवंबर, 12 जनवरी
- जयपुर (Jaipur) बैच प्रारंभ: 10 दिसंबर
- जोधपुर (Jodhpur) बैच प्रारंभ: 2 दिसंबर
Contact and Social Media:
- Website: www.visionias.in
- Delhi Address: GMMR 33, Pusa Road, Near Karol Bagh Metro Station, Opposite Pillar No. 113, Delhi - 110005
- Contact Numbers: 8468022022, 9019066066
